subcodes.title: Li-‘Askari
subcodes.first_line: I bear witness before God, and whatsoever lieth within His knowledge, that there is none other God but Him, and that all else beside Him is His creation and within His grasp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو المتکبر المقتدر الوهاب. اشهد الله و ما هو فی علمه بانه لا اله الا هو و ان ما سواه خلقه و فی قبضته و کل له
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
